value.found_quote: ADK is the open-source agent development framework that lets you build, debug, and deploy reliable AI agents at enterprise scale. Available in Python, TypeScript, Go, Java, and Kotlin.
value.rationale: The page is the official Google ADK documentation site, describing Agent Development Kit (ADK) as an open-source framework. It states "ADK Python 2.0 GA is LIVE," confirming it is generally available/active.
